_template: Operator fills <FILL: …> fields after executing docs/deployment/p3a-run-operator-runbook.md. Copy this file to reports/ahin-p3a-mainnet-readonly-live-ui-run.json before editing. The `false` safety invariants MUST stay false; if any would be true, the run breached its boundary and must be rolled back.
phase: Phase P3A-Run Mainnet Readonly Live-UI Deployment

smoke.balanceReadSmokeResult: <FILL: pass|fail + detail (e.g. wallet <addr> -> rawBalance <u64>, decimals 9, no url in response)>
smoke.eligibilitySmokeResult: <FILL: pass|fail + detail (PoCC threshold evaluated from real balance + Jupiter quote)>

rollbackInstructions: Non-destructive. Rotate/remove the secret: `npx wrangler secret put|delete SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc` (route then fails soft, readonly). Or redeploy the previous P3A bundle, or tear down the separate worker: `npx wrangler delete --name ahin-io-p3a`. Transfer/burn/signing/canary/public-payment flags stay false; root ahin.io and the ahin-io worker are never touched; default wrangler.workers.jsonc (devnet/mock) unaffected.
nextPhase: P3B (single foundation-wallet micro-transfer) remains BLOCKED — additionally requires allowlist + per-payment cap + kill-switch drill + OOB mint/treasury/ATA verification + explicit operator authorization.
